prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约 7885→9679→11604→38102（2024 年新高考专业组拆分，含再选生物组）→13697，整体呈后移趋势；2025 年基准约 13697 名，较 2023 年理科后移约 2093 名；该校在广西物理类（理科）计划数：2021 年 81 人、2022 年 81 人、2023 年 77 人、2024 年 62 人、2025 年 65 人；2026 年计划 44 人，较 2025 年大幅缩招约 32.3%，招生名额明显收紧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2021 年第 44 名、2022 年第 43 名、2023 年第 40 名、2024 年第 43 名、2025 年第 46 名、2026 年第 46 名，近年排名稳定在 40–46 名区间；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），但 2024 年曾因食堂改善获偏正面评价；抖音热度较热（总排名第 46/106），短视频曝光量中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上：体育学 A-、药学 A-；与招生专业关联较强的药学（A-）对应药学专业，材料类、计算机类等暂未进入 A 档。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，相关工科专业报考竞争热度不减；广西 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 39.2 万，较 2025 年增加约 1.26 万人，物理类考生估算约 26.4 万（较 2025 年增约 3800 人），竞争面扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 13697、2026 年大幅缩招（65→44 人）带来的竞争缓解效应、物理类考生增加带来的竞争加剧效应、以及学校声誉偏负面但工科专业热度不减等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年明显前移（位次数字减小，更易录取）；预测最低位次约 11342 名，区间 10842–11842 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 11342 名，区间 10842–11842 名。位次在此区间内建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌工科专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间上限（<10842 名）可重点冲刺计算机、软件、集成电路等一档专业；位次接近区间下限（>11842 名）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 7885→9679→11604→38102 (2024 new Gaokao major group split, including groups with biology as a re-selection subject)→13697, showing an overall backward trend; the 2025 baseline is about 13697, which is about 2093 places behind 2023 Science category; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category (Science) in Guangxi: 81 in 2021, 81 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 62 in 2024, 65 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 44, a significant reduction of about 32.3% compared to 2025, indicating a clear tightening of admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, 44th in 2021, 43rd in 2022, 40th in 2023, 43rd in 2024, 46th in 2025, 46th in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 40–46 range; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but in 2024 it received a somewhat positive evaluation due to cafeteria improvements; Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall rank 46/106), with short video exposure at an above-average level; no obvious record of admission cut-off gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, A- and above: Physical Education A-, Pharmacy A-; among majors strongly related to admissions, Pharmacy (A-) corresponds to the Pharmacy major, while Materials, Computer Science, etc. have not yet entered the A tier.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other majors continue to be highly recommended, with competition for related engineering majors remaining intense; the total number of ordinary Gaokao examinees in Guangxi in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,600 compared to 2025, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 264,000 (an increase of about 3,800 compared to 2025), expanding the competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13697, the competition-relieving effect of the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (65→44), the competition-intensifying effect of the increase in Physics Category examinees, and the factors of a somewhat negative university reputation but undiminished popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly move forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases, easier admission); the predicted minimum ranking is about 11342, with a range of 10842–11842.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 11342, range 10842–11842. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; candidates significantly above the upper limit of the range (<10842) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science, Software, and Integrated Circuits; candidates near the lower limit of the range (>11842) are advised to primarily consider Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年第 46 名，近年排名稳定在 40–46 名区间；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），但 2024 年曾因食堂改善获偏正面评价；抖音热度较热（总排名第 46/106）；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上：体育学 A-、药学 A-；历史类招生专业（汉语言文学、法学、思想政治教育等）对应的中国语言文学、法学、马克思主义理论等学科未进入 A 档。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学分化观望、师范/教育分化观望、汉语言/中文推荐，文科类专业热度分化明显；广西 2026 年历史类考生估算约 12.8 万（较 2025 年增约 8600 人），竞争面扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1557、2026 年小幅扩招（17→18 人）带来的微弱竞争缓解、历史类考生增加带来的竞争加剧、以及学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年略有后移（位次数字增大，竞争略加剧）；预测最低位次约 1642 名，区间 1396–1888 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 963 → 2016 → 1604 → 4703 (2024 new Gaokao major group split, including unrestricted re-selection groups) → 1557, with significant fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is about 1557th, roughly flat with the 2023 Liberal Arts ranking; the university's enrollment plan for History Category (Liberal Arts) in Guangxi: 17 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 17 in 2024, 17 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 18, a slight expansion of about 5.9% compared to 2025, with a modest increase in slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 46th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 40–46 range; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but in 2024 it received a somewhat positive evaluation due to cafeteria improvements; Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall rank 46/106); no obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded; fifth-round discipline evaluation A- and above: Physical Education A-, Pharmacy A-; History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Ideological and Political Education, etc.) correspond to disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature, Law, and Marxist Theory, which did not enter the A tier.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is diverging and wait-and-see, Teacher Education/Education is diverging and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; popularity among liberal arts majors is clearly diverging; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Guangxi in 2026 is about 128,000 (an increase of about 8,600 from 2025), expanding competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1557, the slight expansion in 2026 (17→18) bringing a weak easing of competition, the increase in History Category examinees intensifying competition, and the somewhat negative university reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025 (ranking number increases, competition slightly intensifies); the predicted minimum ranking is about 1642, with a range of 1396–1888.
